summary:
The single breath nitrogen washout test effectively estimates alveolar dead space with high accuracy; other tests are either too general or unrelated to assessing respiratory dead spaces directly. \boxed{D}

The summary captures the essential point about which specific test should be chosen based on accurate estimation capabilities while briefly noting why alternatives aren't suitable. This aligns closely with focusing only on critical aspects related to answering "Anatomical dead space measured by...".
